message:
feat: add full-text search to Spec Evolution Lab

Integrate CorpusIndex for incremental full-text search across all
commits. Uses requestIdleCallback for background indexing to avoid
blocking the UI. Adds search scope toggle (this commit vs all commits)
and results panel. Updates tsconfig to exclude spec files from
type-checking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
